summary: Verification pass on prior FIX (16-file -> 1-file canonical patch strip). Canonical patch JSON is now internally consistent: files_changed_count=1, files_changed='A\tsetup_dkms_linked.py', numstat='86\t0\tsetup_dkms_linked.py', total_additions=86, total_deletions=0, and the embedded unified diff contains exactly one `diff --git a/setup_dkms_linked.py b/setup_dkms_linked.py` block (~92 lines, 86 +-prefixed insertions, 0 -prefixed). No residue of the 15 off-topic files (kfd_pc_sampling.c/h, netfilter xt_* mods, memory-model litmus). Curator note dated 2026-05-07 documents the strip in _reconstruction_warnings. test.sh aligns with the 1-file canonical: it gates on `setup_dkms_linked.py` existing and being importable Python at /workspace/linux/, then exercises only behavioral artifacts that script produces (amdgpu-dkms/ dir, symlink tree under amd/<sub> mirroring drivers/gpu/drm/amd/, dkms.conf with PACKAGE_NAME=amdgpu + BUILT_MODULE_NAME[0] + MAKE[0] + AUTOINSTALL/DEST_MODULE_LOCATION, Makefile referencing KDIR + M= + amdgpu, DKMS-style cp -L staging produces real source files, symlinks resolve from /tmp). All seven F2P gates accept either amdgpu-dkms/<sub> or amdgpu-dkms/amd/<sub> layout (the canonical script uses the latter via amd_dest = os.path.join(DEST_DIR, 'amd')) — implementation-agnostic. No off-topic files referenced anywhere in test.sh.
p2p_regression_note: test.sh uses bash hard-gates (no setup_dkms_linked.py / unparsable Python / no AMD source / script run rc!=0 -> 0.0; exit 0). No P2P_REGRESSION mechanism declared in test_manifest.yaml beyond the trailing comment line — file ends after F2P gates. Naturally bounded; no f2p_any_pass formula or additive-cap bug.
f2p_quality: GOOD — 7 weighted behavioral gates totaling 0.90 (idempotent re-run 0.10, symlink-tree breadth+integrity 0.15, essential source reachability 0.15, dkms.conf semantic correctness 0.20, Makefile content+parse 0.15, DKMS-style cp -L staging 0.15, cwd-independent symlinks 0.10) plus two upstream structural gates (py_compile 0.20, key_functions 0.20). All implementation-agnostic and exercise the canonical setup_dkms_linked.py runtime behavior, not text patterns. Test.sh accepts both --force and idempotent re-run designs (F2P-1) and both amdgpu-dkms/<sub> and amdgpu-dkms/amd/<sub> tree layouts (F2P-2/3/6).
